codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 9741ea0 and confirmed the feature requirements are implemented in shared/src/index.ts: USD1 mainnet/testnet constants and 8 decimals, USDT mainnet/testnet constants, USDe and GHO constants, StablecoinInfo export, STABLECOINS registry (5 entries), backward-compatible USDC exports, and quote-decimal support via QUOTE_DECIMALS + quoteDecimalsFor(). No functional or compatibility issues were identified in scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission feature metadata references skillName frontend-ui-worker, but the worker runtime could not invoke it and had to switch skills.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:331 sets skillName to "frontend-ui-worker" for shared-constants-usd1; worker-transcripts.jsonl (session 311a5425-09e6-496d-bba8-a5d8c028b266) records `Error: Skill "frontend-ui-worker" not found` followed by fallback skill invocation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Assigned frontend skill procedures are UI/web-oriented and do not match this shared-package constants feature, causing justified process deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature scope is shared/src/index.ts (features.json:330), while .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md procedure centers on web/ implementation and visual checks; handoff skillFeedback explicitly documents skipping visual verification for this constants-only change.

summary: Feature shared-constants-usd1 passes review. Implementation in commit 9741ea0 matches the described behavior and preserves backward compatibility. Two skill/state alignment observations were recorded for validator triage.
